dcmtobids 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to dcmtobids

    Dcm2Bids Complete Codebase Exploration

    1. Full Directory Tree with File Sizes

    ./Dcm2Bids/
├── .github/workflows/              # CI/CD configurations
│   ├── cff_validation.yml
│   ├── codespell.yml
│   ├── coverage.yml
│   ├── make_binaries.yml
│   ├── publish.yml
│   ├── publish_doc.yaml
│   └── tests.yml
├── dcm2bids/                       # Main package (2,575 LOC)
│   ├── __init__.py                 # Empty
│   ├── acquisition.py              # 332 lines
│   ├── dcm2bids_gen.py             # 222 lines
│   ├── dcm2niix_gen.py             # 160 lines
│   ├── participant.py              # 101 lines
│   ├── sidecar.py                  # 583 lines
│   ├── version.py                  # 53 lines
│   ├── cli/                        # Command-line interfaces
│   │   ├── __init__.py             # Empty
│   │   ├── dcm2bids.py             # 157 lines
│   │   ├── dcm2bids_helper.py      # 118 lines
│   │   └── dcm2bids_scaffold.py    # 117 lines
│   └── utils/                      # Utility modules
│       ├── __init__.py             # Empty
│       ├── args.py                 # 48 lines
│       ├── io.py                   # 54 lines
│       ├── logger.py               # 58 lines
│       ├── scaffold.py             # 214 lines
│       ├── tools.py                # 115 lines
│       └── utils.py                # 243 lines
├── tests/                          # Test suite
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── test_dcm2bids.py
│   ├── test_dcm2niix.py
│   ├── test_helper.py
│   ├── test_scaffold.py
│   ├── test_sidecar.py
│   ├── test_structure.py
│   ├── test_version.py
│   └── data/                       # Test data and configs
│       ├── config_test*.json       # 10+ test config files
│       └── sidecars/               # Sample DICOM sidecars
│           ├── *.json              # 11 test sidecar files
│           ├── *.nii               # Test NIfTI files
│           └── *.nii.gz            # Compressed test files
├── docs/                           # Documentation
│   ├── index.md
│   ├── upgrade.md
│   ├── changelog/
│   ├── get-started/
│   ├── how-to/
│   ├── tutorial/
│   └── assets/
├── docs_helper/                    # Documentation helper templates
│   └── templates/
├── example/                        # Example config file
│   └── config.json
├── Root configuration files:
│   ├── setup.py                    # Package setup configuration
│   ├── pyproject.toml              # Python project metadata
│   ├── mkdocs.yml                  # Documentation config
│   ├── tox.ini                     # Testing config
│   ├── .coveragerc                 # Code coverage config
│   ├── .flake8                     # Linting config
│   ├── .pylintrc                   # Pylint config
│   ├── requirements-test.txt       # Testing dependencies
│   ├── requirements-doc.txt        # Documentation dependencies
│   ├── environment.yml             # Conda environment
│   ├── Dockerfile                  # Docker configuration
│   ├── README.md                   # Project README
│   ├── LICENSE.txt                 # GPLv3+ License
│   ├── CHANGELOG.md                # Release history
│   ├── CITATION.cff                # Citation metadata
│   ├── CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
│   ├── CONTRIBUTING.md
│   └── MANIFEST.in                 # Package manifest
└── Total: 140 files

    2. All Python Source Files and Their Sizes

    Core Package Files

    File Lines Purpose
    /dcm2bids/version.py 53 Version definition and package metadata
    /dcm2bids/acquisition.py 332 Acquisition class for managing BIDS acquisitions
    /dcm2bids/participant.py 101 Participant class for managing subject/session info
    /dcm2bids/sidecar.py 583 Sidecar and SidecarPairing classes for JSON metadata
    /dcm2bids/dcm2bids_gen.py 222 Main conversion orchestration (Dcm2BidsGen class)
    /dcm2bids/dcm2niix_gen.py 160 DICOM to NIfTI conversion wrapper (Dcm2niixGen class)

    CLI Modules

    File Lines Purpose
    /dcm2bids/cli/dcm2bids.py 157 Main CLI entry point
    /dcm2bids/cli/dcm2bids_helper.py 118 Helper CLI for exploring DICOM sidecars
    /dcm2bids/cli/dcm2bids_scaffold.py 117 BIDS directory scaffolding CLI

    Utility Modules

    File Lines Purpose
    /dcm2bids/utils/utils.py 243 DEFAULT config, utility functions, TreePrinter class
    /dcm2bids/utils/args.py 48 Argument parsing utilities
    /dcm2bids/utils/io.py 54 JSON/file I/O functions
    /dcm2bids/utils/logger.py 58 Logging setup and custom formatter
    /dcm2bids/utils/tools.py 115 Software version checking, dcm2niix tools
    /dcm2bids/utils/scaffold.py 214 BIDS starter kit templates

    Test Files

    File Purpose
    /tests/test_dcm2bids.py Main conversion tests
    /tests/test_dcm2niix.py dcm2niix wrapper tests
    /tests/test_helper.py Helper CLI tests
    /tests/test_scaffold.py Scaffold CLI tests
    /tests/test_sidecar.py Sidecar parsing tests
    /tests/test_structure.py Structure validation tests
    /tests/test_version.py Version module tests

    Total Python Code: 2,575 lines across 21 source files

    3. Main Entry Points

    CLI Entry Points (defined in version.py)

    ENTRY_POINTS = {
    'console_scripts': [
        'dcm2bids=dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids:main',           # Main conversion tool
        'dcm2bids_helper=dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids_helper:main',  # Helper tool
        'dcm2bids_scaffold=dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids_scaffold:main',  # Scaffold tool
    ]
}

    Main Function Locations

    1. dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids:main() - Primary conversion entry point
      • Parses command-line arguments
      • Instantiates Dcm2BidsGen
      • Runs complete conversion pipeline
    2. dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids_helper:main() - Helper utility
      • Runs dcm2niix conversion without BIDS reorganization
      • Outputs sidecars for config file creation
    3. dcm2bids.cli.dcm2bids_scaffold:main() - Directory scaffolding
      • Creates basic BIDS directory structure
      • Initializes README, dataset_description.json, etc.

    4. All Class Definitions and Relationships

    Core Classes

    Participant (participant.py, 101 lines)

    class Participant:
    """Represents a research participant in BIDS format"""

    Properties:
    - name: str (auto-prepended with 'sub-')
    - session: str (auto-prepended with 'ses-', optional)
    - directory: str (returns 'sub-X' or 'sub-X/ses-Y')
    - prefix: str (returns 'sub-X' or 'sub-X_ses-Y')

    Methods:
    - hasSession(): bool

    Acquisition (acquisition.py, 332 lines)

    class Acquisition:
    """Represents a single BIDS acquisition/datatype"""

    Attributes:
    - participant: Participant
    - datatype: str (func, anat, fmap, dwi, etc.)
    - suffix: str (bold, T1w, epi, etc.)
    - custom_entities: str (e.g., 'task-rest')
    - id: str (for reference in config)
    - src_sidecar: Sidecar (source JSON metadata)
    - sidecar_changes: dict (metadata modifications)
    - bids_uri: str (URI style for IntendedFor)
    - do_not_reorder_entities: bool

    Methods:
    - setDstFile(): Reorders filename per BIDS entity table
    - setExtraDstFile(entities): Sets extra destination with new entities
    - dstSidecarData(idList): Builds final JSON metadata
    - prepend(value, char="_"): Static utility

    Properties:
    - build_suffix: Combined custom_entities + suffix
    - srcRoot: Source directory path
    - dstRoot: BIDS destination directory
    - dstId: Relative destination path

    Sidecar (sidecar.py, 583 lines)

    class Sidecar:
    """Represents a single DICOM JSON sidecar file"""

    Attributes:
    - filename: str (path to .json)
    - root: str (filename without extension)
    - data: dict (loaded JSON + metadata)
    - origData: dict (original unmodified JSON)
    - compKeys: list (comparison keys for sorting)

    Methods:
    - __lt__(): Comparison for sorting
    - __eq__(): Equality check
    - __hash__(): For set operations

    Properties:
    - data: JSON content setter/getter
    - origData: Original JSON content

    SidecarPairing (sidecar.py, 583 lines - ~300 for this class)

    class SidecarPairing:
    """Matches sidecars to config descriptions and builds acquisitions"""

    Attributes:
    - sidecars: list[Sidecar]
    - descriptions: list[dict] (config descriptions)
    - graph: OrderedDict (sidecar -> matching descriptions)
    - acquisitions: list[Acquisition] (paired results)
    - extractors: dict (custom entity extractors)
    - auto_extract_entities: bool
    - do_not_reorder_entities: bool
    - search_method: str ('fnmatch' or 're')
    - case_sensitive: bool
    - dup_method: str ('dup' or 'run')
    - post_op: list[dict] (post-processing commands)
    - bids_uri: str ('URI' or 'relative')

    Methods:
    - build_graph(): Match sidecars to descriptions
    - isLink(data, criteria): Check if sidecar matches criteria
    - build_acquisitions(participant): Create Acquisition objects
    - find_runs(): Assign run indices for duplicates

    Properties:
    - search_method: With validation
    - dup_method: With validation
    - post_op: With validation
    - bids_uri: With validation
    - case_sensitive: With validation

    Dcm2niixGen (dcm2niix_gen.py, 160 lines)

    class Dcm2niixGen:
    """Wrapper around dcm2niix executable"""

    Attributes:
    - dicom_dirs: list[str]
    - bids_dir: Path
    - participant: Participant (optional)
    - skip_dcm2niix: bool
    - options: str (dcm2niix command-line options)
    - sidecarFiles: list[str] (paths to generated .json files)
    - helper: bool (for helper mode)

    Methods:
    - run(force=False): Execute dcm2niix
    - execute(): Run dcm2niix for each DICOM directory

    Properties:
    - output_dir: Directory for dcm2niix output

    Dcm2BidsGen (dcm2bids_gen.py, 222 lines)

    class Dcm2BidsGen:
    """Main orchestrator for complete DICOM to BIDS conversion"""

    Attributes:
    - dicom_dirs: list[str] (DICOM input paths)
    - participant: Participant
    - config: dict (loaded config.json)
    - bids_dir: Path (output BIDS directory)
    - clobber: bool (overwrite existing files)
    - bids_validate: bool (run bids-validator)
    - auto_extract_entities: bool
    - do_not_reorder_entities: bool
    - force_dcm2bids: bool
    - skip_dcm2niix: bool

    Methods:
    - run(): Execute complete pipeline
    - move(acq, idList, post_op): Move files to BIDS structure

    Properties:
    - dicom_dirs: With validation

    Utility Classes

    DEFAULT (utils/utils.py)

    class DEFAULT:
    """Global configuration defaults"""

    CLI Options:
    - cli_session: str ("")
    - cli_log_level: str ("INFO")

    DICOM Conversion:
    - output_dir: Path (current directory)
    - session: str ("")
    - clobber: bool (False)
    - force_dcm2bids: bool (False)
    - skip_dcm2niix: bool (False)
    - dcm2niixOptions: str ("-b y -ba y -z y -f '%3s_%f_%p_%t'")

    BIDS Configuration:
    - search_method: str ("fnmatch") - can be 'fnmatch' or 're'
    - search_methodChoices: list (["fnmatch", "re"])
    - case_sensitive: bool (True)
    - auto_extract_entities: bool (False)
    - do_not_reorder_entities: bool (False)
    - dup_method: str ("run") - can be 'dup' or 'run'
    - dup_method_choices: list (["dup", "run"])
    - bids_uri: str ("URI") - can be 'URI' or 'relative'
    - bids_uri_choices: list (["URI", "relative"])

    Entity Extraction:
    - auto_extractors: dict (regex patterns for task, dir, echo)
    - auto_entities: dict (entity configs per datatype)
    - extractors: dict ({})

    Comparison Keys:
    - compKeys: list (["AcquisitionTime", "SeriesNumber", "SidecarFilename"])

    BIDS Entities:
    - entityTableKeys: list (BIDS entity ordering from spec v1.9.0)
    - keyWithPathsidecar_changes: list (['IntendedFor', 'Sources'])

    File/Directory Management:
    - tmp_dir_name: str ("tmp_dcm2bids")
    - helper_dir: str ("helper")
    - bids_version: str ("v1.9.0")

    Templates:
    - runTpl: str ("_run-{:02d}")
    - dupTpl: str ("_dup-{:02d}")

    Direction Mapping:
    - entity_dir: dict (phase encoding -> BIDS direction)

    TreePrinter (utils/utils.py, lines 186+)

    class TreePrinter:
    """Generates ASCII tree representation of directories"""

    Methods:
    - Display directory structure in tree format

    CustomFormatter (utils/logger.py)

    class CustomFormatter(logging.Formatter):
    """Colored logging formatter for console output"""

    Colors:
    - DEBUG: grey
    - INFO: blue
    - WARNING: yellow
    - ERROR: red
    - CRITICAL: bold red

    Relationship Diagram

    Dcm2BidsGen
├── Participant
│   └── name, session
├── Dcm2niixGen (runs dcm2niix)
│   ├── dicom_dirs
│   └── generates Sidecar files
├── SidecarPairing
│   ├── Sidecar[] (from dcm2niix output)
│   ├── descriptions[] (from config.json)
│   ├── Acquisition[] (built from matches)
│   │   ├── participant: Participant
│   │   ├── src_sidecar: Sidecar
│   │   └── sidecar_changes: dict
│   └── build_graph() -> matches sidecars to descriptions
└── moves files to BIDS structure

    5. All Configuration/Data Files

    Configuration Files

    setup.py - Package installation configuration

    • Defines package metadata, dependencies, entry points
    • Version sourced from dcm2bids/version.py
    • Long description from README.md

    pyproject.toml - Modern Python project config

    • Minimal configuration file

    tox.ini - Testing configuration

    • Test environment setup

    mkdocs.yml - Documentation configuration

    • MkDocs settings for building docs

    .coveragerc - Code coverage configuration

    • Coverage.py settings

    .flake8 - PEP8 linting configuration

    • Flake8 style checking rules

    .pylintrc - Pylint configuration

    • Pylint linting rules

    environment.yml - Conda environment definition

    • Conda dependencies for development

    requirements-test.txt - Testing dependencies

    • pytest and related packages

    requirements-doc.txt - Documentation dependencies

    • Sphinx, mkdocs, and related packages

    Dockerfile - Docker container definition

    • Container image build configuration

    Example Configuration

    example/config.json

    • Example dcm2bids configuration showing:
      • Descriptions (criteria + datatype + suffix + custom_entities)
      • Extractors for custom entity extraction
      • Optional post_op operations
      • Optional search_method, case_sensitive, dup_method settings

    Test Data

    **tests/data/config_test*.json**

    10+ test configuration files for various scenarios: - config_test.json - Basic test config - config_test_auto_extract.json - Auto entity extraction - config_test_complex.json - Complex criteria matching - config_test_dup.json - Duplicate handling - config_test_float.json - Float comparison in criteria - config_test_key_absent.json - Handling missing keys - config_test_multiple_intendedfor.json - Multiple IntendedFor - config_test_multiple_intendedfor_uri_relative.json - Relative URIs - config_test_no_reorder.json - Entity reordering disabled - config_test_not_case_sensitive_option.json - Case insensitivity - config_test_sidecar.json - Sidecar modification tests

    tests/data/sidecars/

    Sample DICOM sidecar files from dcm2niix: - 001_localizer* (3 variants) - 002_ep2d_bold - 003_MPRAGE - 004-007_DTI (4 variants) - 010-011_gre_field_mapping (3 variants)

    Associated .nii and .nii.gz test data files

    6. Test Structure

    Test Files (8 total)

    Test File Purpose
    test_dcm2bids.py Main conversion pipeline tests
    test_dcm2niix.py dcm2niix wrapper functionality
    test_helper.py Helper CLI tool tests
    test_scaffold.py BIDS scaffold creation tests
    test_sidecar.py Sidecar parsing and matching
    test_structure.py BIDS structure validation
    test_version.py Version metadata tests
    init.py Test package init

    Test Data Structure

    tests/data/
├── config_test*.json        # 10+ test config files
└── sidecars/
    ├── *.json              # 11 sample sidecar files
    ├── *.nii               # NIfTI test data
    └── *.nii.gz            # Compressed NIfTI test data

    Testing Setup

    • Framework: pytest (from requirements-test.txt)
    • Coverage: Tracked via .coveragerc
    • CI/CD: GitHub Actions (tests.yml workflow)
    • Linting: flake8, pylint

    7. Documentation Files

    Main Documentation Structure

    docs/
├── index.md                    # Main landing page
├── upgrade.md                  # Migration guide from v2 to v3
├── code_of_conduct.md
├── changelog/
│   └── index.md               # Release history
├── get-started/
│   ├── index.md               # Getting started overview
│   └── install.md             # Installation instructions
├── how-to/
│   ├── index.md               # How-to guides overview
│   ├── create-config-file.md  # Config file guide
│   ├── use-main-commands.md   # dcm2bids usage
│   ├── use-advanced-commands.md # Advanced features
│   ├── get-help.md            # Support channels
│   └── contributing.md        # Contribution guide
├── tutorial/
│   ├── index.md               # Tutorial overview
│   ├── first-steps.md         # Basic workflow
│   └── parallel.md            # Parallel processing
└── assets/
    └── img/                   # Documentation images

    Documentation Tools

    • Generator: MkDocs
    • Theme: Material for MkDocs
    • Build Config: mkdocs.yml
    • Helper Templates: docs_helper/templates/main.html

    Project Metadata

    • README.md - Project overview, links, citations
    • CHANGELOG.md - Release history and version notes
    • LICENSE.txt - GPLv3+ license
    • CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md - Community guidelines
    • CONTRIBUTING.md - Contribution guidelines
    • CITATION.cff - Citation metadata

    8. Version and Package Information

    Version (dcm2bids/version.py)

    _version_major = 3
_version_minor = 2
_version_micro = 0
_version_extra = ''
__version__ = '3.2.0'

    Package Metadata

    • Name: dcm2bids
    • Maintainer: Arnaud Boré (arnaud.bore@gmail.com)
    • License: GPLv3+
    • Python: >=3.7 (supports 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11)
    • Dependencies: packaging>=23.1
    • BIDS Spec Version: v1.9.0

    Documentation URLs

    • Docs: https://unfmontreal.github.io/Dcm2Bids
    • Source: https://github.com/unfmontreal/Dcm2Bids

    9. Summary Statistics

    Metric Count
    Total Files 140
    Python Source Files 21
    Total Python LOC 2,575
    Classes 8
    CLI Entry Points 3
    Test Files 7
    Config Test Files 10+
    Documentation Files 15+
    Test Sidecar Files 11

    Code Distribution

    • Core Logic: 583 lines (Sidecar/SidecarPairing)
    • DICOM Conversion: 382 lines (Dcm2BidsGen + Dcm2niixGen)
    • BIDS Entities: 332 lines (Acquisition)
    • Utilities: 530 lines
    • CLI: 392 lines
    • Tests: (not counted)

    10. Technology Stack

    Language & Framework

    • Python 3.8+
    • setuptools for packaging

    Key Dependencies

    • packaging >=23.1 (version parsing)
    • dcm2niix (external - required for DICOM conversion)
    • bids-validator (optional - for BIDS validation)

    Development Tools

    • pytest (testing)
    • flake8 (linting)
    • pylint (code analysis)
    • coverage (code coverage)
    • tox (testing automation)
    • MkDocs (documentation)

    CI/CD

    • GitHub Actions (automated testing, builds, docs)
    • Docker (containerization)
    • Conda/PyPI (package distribution)

    Quick Reference: Core Workflow

    1. User runs: dcm2bids -d DICOM_DIR -p SUB_01 -c config.json -o BIDS_DIR

    2. Dcm2BidsGen.run() orchestrates:

      • Creates Dcm2niixGen to convert DICOMs to NIfTI + JSON
      • Loads config.json
      • Creates Sidecar objects from JSON files
      • Creates SidecarPairing to match sidecars to config descriptions
      • Builds Acquisition objects
      • Calls move() for each Acquisition to place files in BIDS structure

    3. Key Classes Involved:

      • Participant: Manages participant/session labels
      • Acquisition: Represents each BIDS acquisition
      • Sidecar: Wraps JSON metadata
      • SidecarPairing: Matches DICOMs to BIDS specs
      • Dcm2niixGen: Wrapper around dcm2niix tool
      • Dcm2BidsGen: Main orchestrator

    4. Output: Properly organized BIDS dataset with:

      • NIfTI files in correct directories
      • JSON sidecars with modified metadata
      • Post-processing applied (if configured)
      • BIDS validation (if enabled)

    Contents

    Developed by Core Maintainer.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
